casey_question: investigate CHSH for the substrate and rest of substrate in more detail
finding: Substrate-native CHSH (parity + Frobenius candidate) produces measurably different spectrum from Pauli-CHSH; max eigenvalue does NOT immediately equal 126/16; correct substrate-CHSH requires H_sub-derived operators from Sessions 6-14
engineering_implication: Bell experiment at sub-percent precision distinguishes which operator apparatus is probing (Pauli interface or substrate-native)
casey_question_status: concrete demonstration of substrate-CHSH ≠ Pauli-CHSH on 128-dim substrate; full derivation multi-month
